scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared-types typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/config typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/api lint && bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd packages/shared-types lint && bun run --cwd packages/config lint
scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/api test && bun run --cwd apps/web test && bun run --cwd packages/shared-types test && bun run --cwd packages/config test
